Runed Totem Staff  
 

Lore Item Quest Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 37
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 134
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
HP: +5 MANA: +5 ENDUR: +5
WT: 11.0 Size: LARGE
Class: CLR DRU SHM NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 134

Average Price: 25pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common

This item is found on creatures.

NPC Name
Refugee Splitpaw - Blackburrow

Lake Rathetear
NPC Name
a gnoll high shaman

South Karana
NPC Name
High Shaman Grisok
Kurrpok Splitpaw
Shaman Lenrel
Shaman Ren`Rex

This item is used in quests.

Iceclad Ocean
Quest Name
The Mighty Snowfang Hero

Zone(s) Found In:

Blackburrow
Lake Rathetear
South Karana


Uploaded December 26th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
« Previous 1 2 Next »
Post Comment
I remember getting one free in 2001
QuoteReply
# Nov 19 2019 at 4:29 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
Someone gave me one of these for free back in 2001 when I first started playing. A lot of people would bring one of these out of BB to give to a lucky newbie sitting around the Qeynos main gate. It was usually an upgrade for them because they'd be running around with something like a cracked staff/worn great staff or a rusty/tarnished weapon that they got from a decaying skeleton and it enabled them to hunt wisps for lightstones and greater lightstones, which was a really big help since they both sold for pretty good coin and if you were a human, barb or erudite, you needed one for a light source (the lightstones, not the staff) since fire beetle eyes and your newbie candle were too dim for many of the darkest areas. It was probably the first magic weapon that many players got in the early days of the game when good gear and money were a lot harder to come by, and in the days before bazaar when it was harder to connect with other players who had items to sell. In the early days of a progression server, it's a decent item but will become outdated pretty quickly as players start to spread out further from the low level dungeons as they level up and more expansions open.

Edited, Nov 19th 2019 5:42am by animekenji
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?

This dropped tonight when i went exploring by the gnoll area. Just killed em all and that dropped. Though it has 5 Endurance to the weapon now along with a damage bonus of 48.

My warrior almost sold this as he thought it said "Ruined" lucky he caught the misread and gave it to his little druid sister.
▲ Page top
It still drops and the stats are correct
QuoteReply
# Jun 12 2003 at 10:31 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1681085793104
View User Forum
Scholar
80 posts
I was taking my 23 Pally over to The Arena today and had to run through the gnolls at the zone. The were all Dark Blue so I decided to chance a self train. (The zone was behind me and there were only 4 people in the zone with no-one else at risk.)
Of the 6 gnolls who rushed me 2 were High Shamans. I won the fight with 35% health remaining.
On 1 of the Shamans I found this staff, on the other was a Runed Battle Staff.
The stats that are listed on this site are correct. I think the earlier poster is thinking of a different staff.
Hope this helps somebody out.
▲ Page top
Lake Rathe
QuoteReply
# Dec 16 2002 at 12:06 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253699304
1 post
I got this staff tonight in Lake Rathe, but it opped from a normal Gnoll. The Gnoll High Shaman never even had a staff weapon. Only a rusty mace. The gnolls were consistently popping with staff type weaps and eventually with the runed totem staff.

QuoteReply
# Mar 07 2002 at 3:01 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591774962392
150 posts
I remember back in my n00b days huting in BB i was using a cracked staff (this was before the age of expansion and twinking). I had bout 7pp total and i saw somone auction this. As n00bs always do i asked for the stats and price. The guy replied and told me that i could have it for 5pp. this was my first magic item ever (i didnt even have a robe) and i was so happy! Used it to bout lvl 15 when i got my first robe (goosimer robe..ac8 :) and a water crystal staff...GOD was i uber then!

Talornin Wondermaker 51st lvl Wizard of Saryrn.
▲ Page top
+15 mana +15 HP
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2002 at 11:46 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361972700
1 post
I think the mana and hp is wrong on this item, mine is +15 mana +15 Hp, just thought I give ya the info, might have been updated.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 21 2002 at 10:31 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) can i please have this if so my name is lummin lvl5 mage in test server i will give ya 20pp for it
Great weapon for lower level char
QuoteReply
# Jan 09 2002 at 3:56 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591774196610
15 posts
I was running along on Orc Hill in Gfay one day when someone just up and gave me one of these, I was so happy!! I used it for a long time, I know till around 16th level.. give or take a level or two... Only thing is is that it's 2HB.. and it weighed alot. But I dont use it anymore and my 1HB sucks now which I think is more important considering the Enchanter Epic is a 1hb weapon. But really, this weapon was great as a lower level weapon, nice damage, and the stats are great for lower levels when the secondary slot isnt necessary for something else.. such as a Crude Stein, or Doll =)

I'd still like to thank the person who just up and gave me theirs, I still remember that generosity 30 levels later =)
▲ Page top
free one from stranger
QuoteReply
# Sep 23 2001 at 10:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764413617
4 posts
there was this friend of a friend of mine, who gave me everything off his necro, and in it he gave me a runed totem staff, even though i had already had a velium great staff (dont u just luv having friends and guilds). A guild member had already given me a velium great staff, but this one was a little better. Too bad i lost the velium, i couldve sold it for a lot.

LR is the place!
QuoteReply
# Sep 13 2001 at 10:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592791643727
1 post
In Qeynos and Freeport this item goes for 10pp to 15pp. Once I got my latest new character to level 6, here's how I got mine... I ran straight to Lake Rathe and announced a total of two times that I "WTB RTS". A druid in wolf form ran up to me and gave me one without a word. When I said "THANKS!!!", he replied: "np, they drop all the time here are are lore, so, enjoy!"
/e gates back to newbie land ;)

Anyone in South Karana that is looking for this item just needs to step into Lake Rathe and get it off High Gnoll Shaman. There is usually always one there. Spawns pretty quickly. could only pick up one but there were two other corpses with them on. beware of easy trains though.

# May 23 2001 at 9:42 AM Rating: Default

Not just a little odd...downright peculiar, bordering on pure unmitigated BS. LOL!

If it truly happened, nice loot, congrats! I've been hunting elites and comms in BB with my ranger and have only come up with one onyx earring (although a shammy camping the green room gave me an RTS that dropped because 1) he already had one and 2) he didn't want the weight on him.) I think it will be a nice gift for my brand new DE chanter I made last night. ;-)

Them that can, twink...
Enyari (Druid)
Talbhey (Ranger)
